errorCode.msg: Corporate member can't log in with ID and password. Please use the digital key certificate to log in.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while logging in using Bank Sign.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred while processing transaction using Bank Sign Certificate.
Authentication failed. Login user is different from the user who submitted Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred during Block Chain Certificate issuance.
Authentication failed. Login user is different from the user who submitted Bank Sign Certificate.
Error occurred during Block Chain Certificate issuance.
Authentication was not successful. Please start the application process again.
Invalid fintech authentication request. Please try again.
No electronic signature data for fintech authentication. Please try again.
Self-verification processing has failed. Please go back and try again.
Self-verification has failed. Yoru CI information has not been registered or is inactive.
Self-verification has failed. The user who did self-verification is not the same as the user who submitted fintech certificate.
Self-verification has failed. The user who logged in is not the same as the user who submitted fintech certificate.
Error in electronic signature request for fintech authentication. Please try again.
No user ID to be used for electronic signature for fintech authentication
User has not registered fintech authentication. Please register fintech authentication and try again.
Validation of electronic signature data for fintech authentication has failed.
An error occurred during fintech registration.

Authenticaion has failed due to changes in certificate data. Please re-register your certificate using the "Authentication center > Register fintech certificate" menu, or log-in via other methods. If you click confirm, you will be directed to log-in page.
Digital signature data provided has not been successfully validated.
There is no digital signature data storage classification.
Error occurred while processing electronic signature data.
There was no electronic signature data.
There was an error while processing digital signature data.
Digital signature data provided has not been successfully validated.
Digital signature data provided has not been successfully validated.
Digital signature data provided has not been successfully validated.]
interezen Error
There is no menu.
For safe mobile banking, transfer service is limited. Please contact SC call center.(1588-1599)

Electronic financial fraud prevention service has been expanded from internet banking service to mobile banking service across all banks as of Dec. 23 2013.
You have signed up for device designation service already. The device you are using is not registered, thus only inquiry service available. If you want to use money transfer service on mobile phone, please 1) go to [electronic financial fraud prevention service] - [device designation/un-designation] menu and register that particular mobile device as a designated device, or 2] go to [electronic financial fraud prevention service] - [Allow/ban transactions on undesignated device] menu and select “Yes (allow)” to allow transactions on undesignated device (additional authentication).
You can find [electronic financial fraud prevention service] menu at the center bottom of the master menu that opens when you click the left top menu button(the one with number 3).
Please proceed with additional authentication.
Money transfer PIN user can’t use biometric authentication service. Please go to ‘internet banking > service and setting’ menu and unregister the use of money transfer PIN to conduct transactions.
There is no important data found in the process of processing the requested service. Please contact the administrator for inquiry. .
You have entered an incorrect security card number.
You have requested incorrect data [send data is null]
You have requested incorrect data [service code = null]
You have requested incorrect data[message identifier = null]
You have requested incorrect data[duplicate transaction]
[MCICommDataBuilder] The message can’t be brought up because [SCFB_MESSAGE_ID] name to be used to send the message is not correct.
[ScfbCommDataBuilder] [IMS_TRAN_CODE] value is not an 8 digit number.
[ScfbCommDataBuilder] [IN_CLASS_CODE] value to be used is not a 4 digit number.
[ScfbCommDataBuilder] [SERVICE_CODE] value is not a 3 digit number.
[ScfbCommDataBuilder] [BRANCH_NO] value is not a 3 digit number.

Error occurred while processing the transaction you have requested. Please confirm whether your request has been successfully processed in case of deposit/withdrawal transaction. Sorry for the inconvenience.
Sorry, the service is unavailable at this time. Please try again later.
Sorry, the service is unavailable at this time. Please try again later.
There is a system failure. Please try again later.
Error occurred during processing.
Connection was lost. Please try again later. Service is closed if service is not used for a certain period of time, communication is unstable or service is accessed simultaneously on other device.
Error occurred while processing Bank Sign signature.

This menu requires login using digital certificate. Do you want to log in using digital certificate? If you use the device designation service of electronic financial fraud prevention service, please register this device first to make money transfer.

You can use after registering the device designation service.
You are directed to device designation service menu.
There is no registered standard agreement. Please check the standard agreement information.
This device is not allowed to access.
Security card number was not entered.
Encryption session has expired.
Encryption session has expired.
FIDO SERVER communication error occurerd.
Error occurned during FIDO SERVER communication.
Error occurred while viewing the list of authentication devices allowed for registration.
Registration status inquiry. Error occurred during inquiry.
Error occurred in the process of signing biometric certificate.
You are currently using device register service and for new device registeration, you need to add device. If you press OK, you will be relocated to "Register device" menu.

This menu requires login using digital certificate. Do you want to log in using digital certificate? If you use the device designation service of electronic financial fraud prevention service, please register this device first to make money transfer.
There was an error in processing FIDO.
This service is not available to an inquiry service subscriber.
This transaction requires the issuance of a Financial certificate. Do you want to go to the Certificate center?
Your security card(or OTP) has expired. You can access the inquiry menu only. Please visit a nearest branch and get a new security card issued to access the transaction menu such as money transfer.

This menu requires login using certificate.
Do you want to move to login page?

Service is not available due to emergent failure.
Please try again later.
Sorry, the service is unavailable at this time. Please try again later.

Mobile OTP information is initialized upon app re-installation.
Please reissue mobile OTP.
※ No separate authentication procedure is necessary when previous password(PIN) set upon issuance of existing mobile OTP is confirmed.
Mobile OTP related service is only available in Korean. Please switch to Korean if wish to use the service.
This service is available in the mobile banking app. Are you sure you want to go to the app Execution Guidance page?
This service is available in the mobile banking app. Are you sure you want to go to the app Execution Guidance page?

Error occurred while processing the transaction you have requested.
(Simple authentication)

Error occurred while processing the transaction you have requested.
(Phone approval)

Error occurred while processing the transaction you have requested.
(Send SMS)

Error occurred while processing the transaction you have requested.
(Send LMS)
올바른 경로가 아닙니다. 다시 시도해 주세요.
고객정보가 일치하지 않습니다. 다시 확인해 주세요.
(en)E2E필드 복호화 처리 중 오류 발생 errno={0}
(en)복호화 실패({0})
(en)이미지 파일 변환시 오류가 발생하였습니다. 확인 후 다시 시도해주세요.
(en)안면인식이 완료되지 않았습니다.
(en)제휴처코드가 정상적이지 않아 처리중 오류가 발생하였습니다.
(en)REA코드가 정상적이지 않아 처리중 오류가 발생하였습니다.
Small Amount Remittance for USD 5,000 and under are only available during 9:00-16:30.

지금은 공공기관 정보 조회가 원활하지 않아
모바일뱅킹에서 금리인하요구권 신청이 어려워요.
잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요.

금리인하요구권은
가까운 영업점, 고객컨택센터 또는 홈페이지를 통해 신청할 수 있어요.

문의사항: SC제일은행 고객컨텍센터(1588-1599)

지금은 공공기관 정보 조회가 원활하지 않아
모바일뱅킹에서 비대면 한도제한해제가 어려워요.
잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요.

비대면 한도제한해제는
가까운 영업점을 통해 신청할 수 있어요.

문의사항: SC제일은행 고객컨텍센터(1588-1599)
(en)미성년자(19세 미만)는 서비스 이용이 불가합니다.

(en)등록되어 있는 고객정보와 일치하지 않아
서비스를 이용하실 수 없어요.

(en)한국에 거주하고 계셔야
서비스를 이용하실 수 있어요.
Non-Koreans and oversea Koreans cannot use the service.
